name: 55 - CP plan detected Telegram Gate D TEST SAFE

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { event: 'plan_detected', repo: 'mrhz1973/control-plane', planPath: 'docs/plans/2026-05-21_1500_control-plane_pm-09-gate-d.plan.md', commitSha: 'synthetic-gate-d-test', shortSha: 'synthet', task: 'PM-09 Gate D Telegram test', risk: 'low', mode: 'plan', model: 'Composer 2.5', effort: 'Fast', nextStep: 'Review the plan in GitHub and decide whether to execute it.', requiresRuntime: 'yes', requiresHumanGate: 'yes', targetWindow: 'CONTROL PLANE arancione', summary: 'Gate D synthetic plan_detected Telegram payload test.', githubFileUrl: 'https://github.com/mrhz1973/control-plane/blob/main/docs/plans/2026-05-21_1500_control-plane_pm-09-gate-d.plan.md', testSafe: true } }];

const j = $json;
const lines = [
  'CONTROL PLANE plan_detected',
  `Repo: ${j.repo}`,
  `Plan: ${j.planPath}`,
  `Task: ${j.task}`,
  `Mode/Model: ${j.mode} / ${j.model}`,
  `Effort: ${j.effort}`,
  `Risk: ${j.risk}`,
  `Runtime: ${j.requiresRuntime}`,
  `Human gate: ${j.requiresHumanGate}`,
  `Window: ${j.targetWindow}`,
  '',
  `Summary: ${j.summary}`,
  `Next: ${j.nextStep}`,
  '',
  `Commit: ${j.shortSha}`,
  `URL: ${j.githubFileUrl}`,
  '',
  'Gate D TEST SAFE. Synthetic payload. Does not touch 40 ACTIVE.'
];
return { json: { text: lines.join('\n'), event: j.event, testSafe: true } };
